{{WIP}}
{{Missing Info|specifics=A lot. Added Requirements may be incorrect due to AFFCT Reduction}}

==Key Clue Records==
Complete these Key Clues in [[Hellas]] for various rewards and to fully progress through the Realm.

==Olympus Myth==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Lottery Ticket, +3}}, {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +10K}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
|-
|Master all Hellenic INTEL
|Obtain all 47 [[Hellenic_INTEL#Hellenic INTEL|Hellenic INTEL]] tiles
|-
|Master all goddess strategy
|Obtain all 71 [[Hellenic_INTEL#Godess' Guide INTEL|Godess' Guide INTEL]] tiles
|}

==Mediterranean Trading==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +500}}, {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +15K}} 
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
|-
|Redeem all [[Hellenic Cards#Tier 1 (White)|limited cards (white)]]
|-
|Redeem all [[Hellenic Cards#Tier 2 (Green)|limited cards (green)]]
|-
|Redeem all [[Hellenic Cards#Tier 3 (Blue)|limited cards (blue)]]
|-
|Redeem all [[Hellenic Cards#Tier 4 (Purple)|limited cards (purple)]]
|-
|Redeem all [[Hellenic Cards#Tier 5 (Orange)|limited cards (orange)]]
|}

==Athena's Awakening==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +500}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Lottery Ticket, +3}} 
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
|-
|Collect all Posh type costumes
|-
|Collect all Moody type costumes
|-
|Collect all Cute type costumes
|-
|Collect all Wicked type costumes
|}

==Hellenic Treasures==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Hellenic Treasure Map, +50}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Golden Pickaxe, +3|orange}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!<nowiki>#</nowiki> of items found
!Rewards
|-
|Secret of Aries (Aries)||3||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Toner, +60}}
|-
|Hellenic Gyros Box (Aries)||2||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Mecha Cell, +2000}},
|-
|Secret of Taurus (Taurus)||4||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +300}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +1h}}
|-
|Dairy Gift Box (Taurus)||3||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}, {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +5000}}
|-
|Secret of Gemini (Gemini)||2||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Zombie Cell, +2000}}
|-
|Maid’s Handicraft (Gemini)||4||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +300}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Refine Speedup, +2h}}
|-
|Secret of Cancer (Cancer)||3||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup, +2h}}
|-
|Sealed Supplies (Cancer)||3||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Clone Speedup, +2h}},
|-
|Secret of Leo (Leo)||2||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Angel Cell, +2000}}
|-
|Spartan Offering (Leo)||4||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +300}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Novice Scroll, +10}},
|-
|Secret of Virgo (Virgo)||3||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Stone, +2000}}
|-
|Maiden’s Gift (Virgo)||3||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Demon Cell, +2000}}
|-
|Secret of Libra (Libra)||3||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +1h}},
|-
|Scholar’s Document (Libra)||3||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Clone Speedup, +2h}}
|-
|Secret of Scorpio (Scorpio)||3||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Wood, +2000}}
|-
|Ancient Case (Scorpio)||3||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Organ Slime, +60}},
|-
|Secret of Sagittarius (Sagittarius)||4||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +300}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Angel Cell, +2000}},
|-
|Elven's Gift (Sagittarius)||3||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Mutant Cell, +2000}},
|-
|Secret of Capricorn (Capricorn)||3||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Refine Speedup, +2h}},
|-
|The Unclean (Capricorn)||2||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Demon Cell, +2000}},
|-
|Secret of Aquarius (Aquarius)||4||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +300}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup, +2h}},
|-
|Philosopher's Legacy (Aquarius)||3||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}, {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +20k}},
|-
|Secret of Pisces (Pisces)||2||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Clone Speedup, +2h}},
|-
|Civilization Gift (Pisces)||4||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +300}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Lottery Ticket, +1}},
|}

==Athena's Spear==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Glue, +100}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +4h}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
|-
|Craft {{Gearlink|green|realm|Legion Javelins}}
|-
|Craft {{Gearlink|blue|realm|Macedonian Spear}}
|-
|Craft {{Gearlink|purple|realm|Hector Spear}}
|-
|Craft {{Gearlink|orange|realm|Stardust Arrow}}
|-
|Craft {{Gearlink|orange|realm|Eternal Empire Scepter}}
|-
|Craft {{Gearlink|red|realm|Athena Spear}}
|}

==Altar of Gods==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Divine Order Chest, +50}}, {{RewardIcon|Achilles' Shield}} {{Gearlink|purple|realm|Achilles' Shield}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!Clue!!Requirements!!Rewards
|-
|Apollo's Grace (Taurus)
|Apollo Altar
|15950 FTH
|{{RewardIconWithText|Pie from Heaven, +10}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Hera's Grace (Virgo)
|Hera Altar
|16300 FTH
|{{RewardIconWithText|Pie from Heaven, +10}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Artemis' Grace (Cancer)
|Artemis Altar
|16250 FTH
|{{RewardIconWithText|Pie from Heaven, +10}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Dionysus Altar (Aquarius)
|???
|16050 FTH
|{{RewardIconWithText|Pie from Heaven, +10}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|}

==Greco-Persian Wars==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Evolution Chest, +100}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup, +3h}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!Clue!!Requirements!!Rewards
|-
|Spartan Helmet (Scorpio)||Battle of Thermopylae||ART 16750?||{{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup, +15m}}, Meal Box Size +100
|-
|Spartan Hat (Gemini)||Defense of Athens||TECH 15500?||{{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup, +15m}}, Meal Box Size +100
|-
|Persian Navy Hat (Virgo)||Battle of Salamis||ART 16300?||{{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup, +15m}}, Meal Box Size +100
|-
|Persian Cavalry Hat (Aquarius)||Battle of Plataea||Display {{RewardIconWithLink|Nuclear Bomb|orange}}||{{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup, +15m}}, Meal Box Size +100
|}

There may be alternatives for the {{RewardIconWithLink|Nuclear Bomb|orange}}.

==Peloponnesian War==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +500}}, {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +10,000}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!Requirements!!Rewards
|-
|Peace of Nicias (Leo)||CIV 16050?||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +50}}, Meal Box Size +100
|-
|Spartan War Declaration (Scorpio)||ART 16800?||{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +50}}, Meal Box Size +100
|-
|Alliance of Peace (Capricorn)||?||?
|-
|Athens War Declaration (Capricorn)||?||?
|}

==Spartan System==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Clone Speedup, +3h}}, {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +15,000}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!Requirements!!Rewards
|-
|Senate Order (Aries)||?||?
|-
|Commerce Ban (Libra)||TECH 16550?||?
|-
|Unknown (Capricorn)||?||?
|-
|Unknown (Sagittarius)||?||?
|}

==Tragedy of Byzantium==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIcon|Wonder Fungus Orange ATK}} {{Retext|Orange ATK-Fungus|orange}} +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Magic Potion, +30}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!Clue!!Requirements!!Rewards
|-
|Bloody Hood (Cancer)
|Saracen Invasion
|ART 16600?
|{{RewardIcon|Wonder Fungus Green ATK}} {{Retext|Green ATK-Fungus|green}} +1, Meal Box Size +100
|-
|Bloody Cross Flag (Sagittarius)
|Crusader's Pillage
|ART 19500?
|{{RewardIcon|Wonder Fungus Green RUSH}} {{Retext|Green RUSH-Fungus|green}} +1, Meal Box Size +100
|-
|Constan XI's Blade (Aquarius)
|The Last Glory
|ART 18350?
|{{RewardIcon|Wonder Fungus Green HP}} {{Retext|Green HP-Fungus|green}} +1, Meal Box Size +100
|}

==Solon's Reforms==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Demon Manual, +10}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Dragon Manual, +10}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!Clue!!Requirements!!Rewards
|-
|Politics Reform Plan (Leo)
|?
|?
|?
|-
|Law Reform Plan (Gemini)
|?
|?
|?
|-
|Commerce Reform Plan (Virgo)
|?
|?
|?
|-
|Constitution Reform Plan (Libra)
|Make a New Code
|Display {{RewardIconWithLink|Code of Law|blue}} or Display {{RewardIconWithLink|Twelve Tables|blue}}
|?
|}

==Gods' Factions==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Hellenic Treasure Map, +50}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Ad Chest, +100}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!Rewards
|-
|Watch the Knight Hiring Ad (Scorpio)
|Ad Chest +10, ???
|-
|Watch the Ocean Knight Hiring Ad (Taurus)
|Ad Chest +10, ???
|-
|Watch the Nether Knight Hiring Ad (Libra)
|Ad Chest +10, ???
|-
|Watch the Divine Knight Hiring Ad (Leo)
|Ad Chest +10, ???
|}

==Balkan Powder Keg==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Wish Coin, +1}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Evolution Chest, +100}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!Clue!!Requirements!!Rewards
|-
|Blasting Fuse (Aries)
|Overcast Sky
|CIV 15050?
|{{RewardIconWithText|Demon Cell, +500}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Strategic Map (Cancer)
|Coliseum of Great Powers
|CIV 15800?
|{{RewardIconWithText|Zombie Cell, +500}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Treaty of Londorn (Pisces)
|War of Balkans
|CIV 16075?
|{{RewardIconWithText|Mutant Cell, +500}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|}

==Recapture the Sanctuary==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +2h}}, {{RewardIconWithText|B-tad, +10k}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!Rewards
|-
|Sagittarius Conquest
|???
|-
|Capricorn Conquest
|???
|-
|Aquarius Conquest
|???
|-
|Pisces Conquest
|???
|}

==Alexander's Conquest==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithLink|Alexander's Anabasis|green}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Clone Speedup, +3h}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!Clue!!Requirements!!Rewards
|-
|Tyrian Head (Capricorn)
|To the East
|ART 18000?
|{{RewardIconWithText|Clone Speedup, +15m}}, Meal Box Size +100
|-
|Persian Head (Aries)
|Persian Conquest
|ART 15850?
|{{RewardIconWithText|Clone Speedup, +15m}}, Meal Box Size +100
|-
|Hellenic Head (Scorpio)
|Bharata Expedition
|ART 17500?
|???
|}

==Polis==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Stone, +2000}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Wood, +2000}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!Clue!!Requirements!!Rewards
|-
|Corinth City Blueprint (Taurus)
|Establishment of Corinth
|TECH 15300?
|{{RewardIconWithText|Wood, +500}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Siracuse City Blueprint (Aries)
|Establishment of Siracuse
|TECH 17500?
|{{RewardIconWithText|Stone, +500}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Mycenae City Blueprint (Pisces)
|Establishment of Mycenae
|TECH 18600?
|{{RewardIconWithText|Wood, +500}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Chalcis City Blueprint (Gemini)
|Establishment of Chalcis
|TECH 18000?
|{{RewardIconWithText|Stone, +500}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|}

==Olympic Games==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithLink|Euclid's Elements|blue}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup, +3h}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!Clue!!Requirements!!Rewards
|-
|Gold Medal-Shot Put (Gemini)
|Shot Put Competition
|FAME 18000?
|{{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup, +15m}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Gold Medal-Javelin (Pisces)
|Javelin Competition
|FAME 18500?
|{{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup, +15m}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Gold Medal-Sprint (Pisces)
|Sprint Race
|FAME 18600?
|{{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup, +15m}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|}

==Cleanse the Monsters==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Organ Chest, +100}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Lava Gallbladder, +1}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!Clue!!Requirements!!Rewards
|-
|Horn of Cursed Titan (Cancer)
|???
|???
|???
|-
|Horn of Cursed Ares (Leo)
|???
|???
|???
|-
|Horn of Cursed Hades (Libra)
|???
|???
|???
|-
|Sin of Poseidon (Sagittarius)
|???
|15550 Fame
|{{RewardIconWithText|Organ Slime, +10}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Horn of Cursed Zeus (Capricorn)
|???
|???
|???
|}

==The Prosperity of Macedonia==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Refine Speedup, +3h}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Superstar Ad Flyer, +5}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!Clue!!Requirements!!Rewards
|-
|Ceremony Invitation (Sagittarius)
|Philip II's Ascendance
|CIV 19500?
|{{RewardIconWithText|Refine Speedup, +15m}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Kingdom Document (Aries)
|Strengthening the Monarchy
|CIV 16500?
|{{RewardIconWithText|Refine Speedup, +15m}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Reform Document (Virgo)
|Monetary Reform
|CIV 18750?
|{{RewardIconWithText|Refine Speedup, +15m}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Alliance Terms (Aquarius)
|League of Corinth
|TECH 18200?
|{{RewardIconWithText|Refine Speedup, +15m}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|}
